title: HPotions
description: HPotions adds custom potions that lets you see specific ores, even through blocks!
body:
# 👁️ HPotions
**See ores through walls with magical vision potions!** ⛏️✨

HPotions adds **8 magical eye potions** that let you see specific ores through blocks with glowing outlines — perfect for efficient mining and ancient debris hunting in the Nether! 🔥

**✨ NOW WORKS WITH SHADERS!**

## 📥 Installation
⚠️ **Required on BOTH client and server** to function properly in multiplayer.

## 🧪 Ore Vision Potions

| Potion | Detects | Outline Color |
|--------|---------|---------------|
| 🟠 Copper Eye | Copper Ore | Orange |
| ⚫ Iron Eye | Iron Ore | Light Gray |
| 🟡 Gold Eye | Gold Ore | Golden Yellow |
| 🔵 Lapis Eye | Lapis Lazuli Ore | Blue |
| 🔴 Redstone Eye | Redstone Ore | Red |
| 💎 **Diamond Eye** | **Diamond Ore** | **Cyan** |
| 🟢 Emerald Eye | Emerald Ore | Green |
| 🔥 **Ancient Debris Eye** | **Ancient Debris** | **Dark Red** |

## ✨ Features

### X-Ray Vision Through Walls
Colored glowing outlines make ores visible through solid blocks:

![Ore Detection Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66f484a28760dad22bc47a31b3b63fcb56e8ea3d.png)
![Multiple Ores Highlighted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2475dc5edc3a6a0602883e26d83eda566adf7939.png)

### Balanced Duration System
- ⏱️ **Normal Potion:** 3:00 minutes
- 💥 **Splash Potion:** 1:30 minutes  
- 💨 **Lingering Potion:** 0:45 seconds

### Ore-Gated Crafting
🔒 You must find at least **1 piece of each ore** naturally before you can craft its vision potion — keeping progression balanced!

### Performance Optimized
⚡ Designed for minimal lag and maximum FPS, even in massive cave systems.

### Shader Compatible
✨ Works perfectly with popular shader packs — no visual conflicts!

## 🔨 How to Craft

**Step 1:** Brew the base **Mundane Eye** potion  
Combine **Awkward Potion** + **Ender Pearl** in a brewing stand

![Mundane Eye Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ddc309da29430d659851265ba2f23e17589ac80.png)

**Step 2:** Brew your ore-specific vision potion  
Combine **Mundane Eye** + **1 Ore Ingot/Piece** in a brewing stand

![Ore Potion Brewing Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0c0291109200b5d5a9b63c4f5b8397789f92125.png)

📖 **[View Full Crafting Guide & Recipes](https://github.com/hotiovip/HPotions/wiki)**

## 🌍 Language Support
HPotions is fully localized in:
- 🇬🇧 **English**
- 🇩🇪 **German** (Deutsch)
- 🇮🇹 **Italian** (Italiano)

## 💡 Suggest New Ores!
Want support for **modded ores** or other vanilla blocks? 🌟  

💬 **[Open an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/hotiovip/HPotions/issues)** and suggest your ideas!

We're actively taking community feedback for future updates. 🚀

---

*⛏️ Transform your mining experience. Brew smarter, mine faster!*
